embeds.title: ЁЯжЗ LEGO┬о Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight
embeds.description:
Cracked install + gold-set unlocks and a performance fix.
**[ЁЯУе FitGirl Repack Download](https://fitgirl-repacks.site/lego-batman-legacy-of-the-dark-knight/)**

fields.name: ЁЯОо Unlock Gold Set + Performance Fix
fields.value:
1. Move spiritovod's `.pak`, `.ucas`, `.utoc` files into `...\LEGOBatmanLotDK\Content\Paks\~mods\`
2. Clear server cache тАФ `Win+R` тЖТ `%localappdata%\Dinner\Saved\PersistentDownloadDir\WBASDK\Save\` тЖТ **delete** `f09e73ec2b99e39e30b4252f497ef32b`
3. Launch from `...\Binaries\Win64\LEGOBatmanLotDK-Win64-Shipping.exe` тАФ **not** the main shortcut.
4. In-game: **Main Menu тЖТ Redeem Code** (codes below).

fields.name: ЁЯФС Redeem Codes
fields.value:
`00000001` тАФ The Batman (Gold) Batmobile
`00000002` тАФ Batman & Robin (Gold) Batmobile
`00000003` тАФ Batman v Superman (Gold) Batmobile
`00000007` тАФ Golden Knight Suit
`00000017` тАФ Golden Red Brick
-# Codes `00000004`тАУ`00000016` unlock Twitch drops / props.

fields.name: тЪЩя╕П Optional тАФ Engine.ini Optimization
fields.value:
**VRR vs No-VRR:** if G-Sync/FreeSync is enabled in *both* your GPU control panel and monitor, use **VRR** тАФ otherwise use **No-VRR**.

1. Run the game once, then close it.
2. `Win+R` тЖТ `%localappdata%\Dinner\Saved\Config\Windows`
3. Overwrite **Engine.ini** with your chosen version (attached).
4. Right-click `Engine.ini` тЖТ **Properties** тЖТ check **Read-Only** тЖТ Apply.

fields.name: тЪая╕П Notes
fields.value:
- Keep mod files in `~mods` or your save data may corrupt.
- **Don't combine with other optimization mods.**
- To uninstall: delete the modded `Engine.ini`.

footer.text: LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight Guide
